FIGHT STRATEGY — Lagavulin (elite, 112 HP, asleep, Metallicize 8). TYPE: race-after-setup. It sleeps T1-2, stirs T3, attacks T4+ (18-20/hit, 2 attacks then Siphon -1Str/-1Dex). Damage-wake grants no free turn (codified note). PLAN: T1-T2 pure setup (Inflame, FNP, Armaments upgrades), NO chip damage (HP loss wakes it). T3 (stir turn) drink Strength Potion and open the burst. From T4: attack + block 18-20. ZERO-DMG: 2 Defends + IW per turn won't cover 18 — accept ~6-10/turn on attack turns, kill before 2nd Siphon. Expected cost 25-40. WIN%: 31%.

RISK: skill-heavy hands T2+ are dead weight. WIN%: 35%.

FIGHT STRATEGY — HEXAGHOST (boss, 250 HP). Prep: no Weak source, full 80 HP, Metallicize+Barricade passive block, scaling = the ENGINE itself (Barricade block snowball -> Body Slam x2 convert it every turn; Burns burn into persistent block, not HP — Barricade is natural Burns management). PLAN: T1 (Activate, free) = Barricade. T2 Divider 42 (7x6 at 80HP) = all-in block, accept ~20-25. T3+ each turn: block cards first, Body Slam+ converts accumulated wall; thorns 3/hit punishes Divider/Inferno (6 hits = 18). Save nothing: 0-cost BS+ every cycle. RISK: pre-snowball turns T2-4; first Inferno 24 ~T9 must be over-blocked by Burn count. Expected cost 30-45. WIN%: 46%.
